name: Quasar Framework
description: Enterprise-ready Vue.js framework for building responsive SPAs, SSR apps, PWAs, mobile apps, and desktop apps from a single codebase

framework.comment: Vue 3 framework with comprehensive cross-platform capabilities

styling-approach.comment: Uses SASS/SCSS with comprehensive variable system and Material Design styling

component-model.comment: Fully styled Material Design components ready to use out of the box

typescript.comment: First-class TypeScript support with type definitions included

ssr-compatible.comment: Full SSR support through Quasar CLI with dedicated SSR mode

rsc-compatible.comment: Not applicable - Vue framework, RSC is React-specific

design-system.comment: Implements Material Design guidelines with customizable components

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode support with auto-detection and manual control

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming with Theme Builder tool for customizing 10 primary color variables

css-variables.comment: Uses SASS/SCSS variables for theming, not CSS custom properties

design-tokens.comment: Extensive SASS variables for spacing, colors, typography, shadows, and component-specific tokens

rtl-support.comment: Comprehensive RTL support with dynamic switching and automatic CSS transformation via postcss-rtlcss

component-count.comment: 72 distinct Vue components including form inputs, data display, feedback, overlays, navigation, and layout components

text-input.comment: QInput component supports text, search, URL, tel, password, email and other HTML5 input types

textarea.comment: QInput with type='textarea' and autogrow option for dynamic sizing

select.comment: QSelect component with single and multiple selection modes

multi-select.comment: QSelect supports multiple selection with array model

combobox.comment: QSelect with use-input prop enables autocomplete/filtering and custom value creation via new-value-mode

checkbox.comment: QCheckbox with indeterminate state, custom icons, array models, and native form support

radio.comment: QRadio component for single-option selection with customization options

switch-toggle.comment: QToggle component for boolean values with indeterminate state support

slider.comment: QSlider and QRange components - QSlider for single value, QRange for dual-value range selection

number-input.comment: QInput with type='number' and v-model.number modifier, plus QKnob for interactive number input via mouse/touch panning

tag-input.comment: No dedicated tag input component. Can be built using QSelect with multiple selection and new-value-mode

pin-input.comment: No dedicated OTP/PIN code input component

color-picker.comment: QColor component with full color picker UI (not just input type=color)

date-picker.comment: QDate component with Gregorian and Persian calendar support, range selection, and multiple selection modes

time-picker.comment: QTime component with 12/24-hour formats, landscape mode, and customizable time masks

date-range-picker.comment: QDate supports range selection with range-start and range-end events

file-upload.comment: QFile component for file picking with accept filters, multiple file support, and visual customization

dropzone.comment: QUploader is drag-and-drop compliant with batch upload, auto-upload, and custom validation filters

rating-input.comment: QRating component with customizable icons, colors, half-star support, and tooltips

input-groups.comment: QInput and other form components support before/after slots for icons, buttons, and text addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: Can combine QInput with QMenu or use QSelect for input with dropdown functionality

button-groups.comment: QBtnGroup component for grouped/segmented buttons, plus QBtnToggle for toggle button groups

split-button.comment: QBtnDropdown supports split button mode separating main action from dropdown trigger

table.comment: QTable component with basic and advanced features, plus QMarkupTable for simpler HTML table styling

data-table.comment: QTable includes sorting, filtering, pagination (client and server-side), row selection, expansion, and grid mode

virtual-infinite-list.comment: QVirtualScroll component for efficient rendering of large lists with horizontal/vertical scrolling. Also QInfiniteScroll for load-more patterns

tree-view.comment: QTree component with nested children, lazy loading, filtering, multiple selection modes, and custom slots

list-view.comment: QList and QItem components for styled lists with avatars, thumbnails, multi-line labels, and Vue Router integration

card.comment: QCard component with QCardSection and QCardActions for organizing content and actions

avatar.comment: QAvatar component with circular, square, or rounded shapes supporting text, icons, or images

badge.comment: QBadge component for contextual indicators with floating, outline, and transparent variants

tag-chip-pill.comment: QChip component for compact information blocks with closable/removable functionality, avatars, and icons

timeline.comment: QTimeline component with dense, comfortable, and loose layout options for chronological event display

calendar.comment: No dedicated calendar view component. QDate provides date picker functionality but not month/week calendar views

alert.comment: QBanner component for prominent static messages with optional actions

toast-notification.comment: Notify plugin for animated toast/snackbar notifications with positioning, actions, grouping, and progress indication

progress-bar.comment: QLinearProgress with determinate and indeterminate states, buffer support, and customizable styling

progress-circle.comment: QCircularProgress with determinate/indeterminate states, value display, and rounded arcs

spinner-loader.comment: Multiple spinner components (QSpinner, QSpinnerGears, etc.) plus Loading plugin for full-screen overlays

skeleton.comment: QSkeleton component with predefined types (text, rect, circle) and pre-made recipes for common layouts

empty-state.comment: No dedicated empty state component. Can be built using QCard, QBanner, or custom markup

modal-dialog.comment: QDialog component with flexible positioning, maximized mode, nested dialogs, and Dialog Plugin for programmatic use

drawer-sheet.comment: QDrawer component as part of QLayout with normal, mini, and overlay modes. Also Dialog Plugin for bottom sheets

popover.comment: QPopupProxy provides responsive popup behavior (QMenu on desktop, QDialog on mobile)

tooltip.comment: QTooltip component with custom delays, positioning, transitions, and RTL support

dropdown-menu.comment: QMenu component for dropdown menus with intelligent positioning and v-close-popup directive

context-menu.comment: QMenu supports context menu via right-click (desktop) and long-tap (mobile)

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette component (⌘K style)

tabs.comment: QTabs and QTab components with horizontal scrolling, custom indicators, badges, and Vue Router integration

vertical-tabs.comment: QTabs supports vertical orientation with dedicated examples

breadcrumb.comment: QBreadcrumbs component with Vue Router integration, custom separators, and alignment options

pagination.comment: QPagination component with button-only and input modes for page jumping

stepper.comment: QStepper component for multi-step processes with horizontal/vertical layouts, linear/non-linear navigation, and keep-alive support

navigation-menu.comment: QMenu with QList for navigation menus, plus QExpansionItem for hierarchical navigation

sidebar.comment: QDrawer as part of QLayout provides collapsible sidebar with mini mode

bottom-navigation.comment: No dedicated bottom navigation component. Can be built using QFooter with QTabs or QBtnGroup

grid.comment: Flexbox-based 12-point grid system with responsive breakpoint classes

stack.comment: Flexbox utilities (row/column classes) for vertical/horizontal stacking

container.comment: QPage and QPageContainer provide content containers, plus responsive container classes

divider.comment: QSeparator component for horizontal/vertical dividers with color customization and inset options

aspect-ratio.comment: QVideo component has aspect ratio controls, plus utility classes for aspect ratio maintenance

collapsible.comment: QExpansionItem component for collapsible content with accordion mode and popup mode

resizable.comment: QSplitter component for resizable panels with vertical/horizontal orientation and draggable separators

splitter.comment: QSplitter enables split panes with customizable dimensions (% or px) and drag limits

rich-text-editors.comment: QEditor is a built-in WYSIWYG editor component with customizable toolbar and dropdown support

chart-libraries.comment: No built-in or official chart library integrations

form-libraries.comment: Built-in form validation support but no official bindings to external form libraries like VeeValidate or Vuelidate

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in animation support via Animate.css with 80+ animation types

icon-libraries.comment: QIcon natively supports Material Icons, Material Symbols, Font Awesome, Ionicons, MDI, Eva Icons, Themify Icons, Line Awesome, and Bootstrap Icons

date-libraries.comment: Built-in date utilities to avoid bundle size overhead of external libraries like Moment.js

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns, though GitHub issues indicate some gaps remain

keyboard-navigation.comment: Components support keyboard navigation, though some accessibility issues exist (e.g., QTabPanels keyboard access)

screen-reader-tested.comment: 17 open accessibility issues on GitHub including screen reader support gaps

focus-management.comment: Modal/dialog components implement focus trapping and restoration

wcag-level.comment: No documented WCAG compliance level claimed

accessibility-rating.comment: Adequate accessibility with ARIA compliance and keyboard navigation, but gaps in screen reader testing and some open a11y issues

bundle-size-full.comment: BundlePhobia could not be accessed. Quasar is designed for tree-shaking, making full bundle size not representative of typical usage

bundle-size-core.comment: Bundle size varies by components imported. Quasar CLI auto-imports only used components, keeping bundles minimal

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports tree-shaking with selective imports (except UMD builds). Quasar CLI auto-imports only used components

zero-runtime.comment: Not zero-runtime; includes JavaScript for component functionality and interactions

lazy-loading.comment: QIntersection component enables lazy loading via Intersection Observer API, plus async component support

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with comprehensive API reference, extensive examples, tips/warnings, integration guidance, and interactive API explorer

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes live component examples and interactive API explorer for each component

figma-kit.comment: No official Figma design kit found

cli-generator.comment: Quasar CLI provides comprehensive project scaffolding, component auto-import, and build tools for multiple platforms

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Weekly downloads for week of December 16-22, 2025

active-maintenance.comment: Regular commits through November 2025 with bug fixes, features, and dependency updates

commercial-support.comment: Open-source project with community support via forum and Discord, but no documented commercial/enterprise support tier

style-override.comment: Supports className prop for custom classes, style prop for inline styles, and SASS variable overrides

compound-components.comment: Uses compound component pattern extensively (QCard/QCardSection, QList/QItem, QTable/QTd/QTh, etc.)

render-props.comment: Components support scoped slots (Vue equivalent of render props) for customization

slots.comment: Extensive use of named slots for content injection across all components

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled mode - Quasar is a fully styled component library
